category_sources: Official Bit-Twist documentation describes packet generation and editing for pcap traffic.
source_facts.description identifies Bit-Twist as a libpcap-based Ethernet packet generator.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project use Bit-Twist branding.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Bit-Twist site.
docs_sources: Official Bit-Twist documentation page provides quickstart and examples.
Official man pages document bittwist and bittwiste commands.
repo_sources: Official Bit-Twist news page says a GitHub repo was added for source code browsing at github.com/ayeowch/bittwist.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes pcap packet editing, replay, and network testing use cases.
source_facts.description identifies an Ethernet packet generator.
